description: Updated proposal presented to CB10's Transportation, Historic Preservation & Landmarks Committee in June 2025. Includes offset bus lanes, pedestrian spaces, concrete pedestrian islands, left turn lanes, mid-block crossings, bus queue jump signal, and parking changes along 116th Street from Manhattan Avenue to Pleasant Avenue.
Project to add bus lanes, pedestrian space, left turn lanes, mid-block crossings, bus queue jump signal, and other improvements along 116th Street from Morningside Avenue to Pleasant Avenue area
Bus and pedestrian priority improvements on 116th Street from 5th Avenue to Pleasant Avenue and on Pleasant Avenue from 116th to 120th Street

Proposed bus and pedestrian priority improvements on 116th Street from 5th Avenue to Pleasant Avenue, including offset bus lanes, pedestrian islands, bus queue jump signals, left turn lanes, and parking-protected bike lanes

Project proposes curbside bus lane on Manhattan Avenue between 110th St and 116th St, pedestrian space repurposing slip lane on Morningside Avenue, concrete pedestrian islands, bus stop removal/consolidation, and painted curb extension at Morningside Avenue and 116th Street.
